effects.raw_clause: search your deck OR discard pile for "Ready to Rumble" and add it to your hand

in_play.name: You're Not Ready
in_play.raw_text:
Search your deck or discard pile for "Ready to Rumble" and add it to your hand.  You may play that card as an additional card this turn.
If you have "Ready to Rumble" in play, your opponent's Gimmick is blank.

effects.raw_clause: Your next turn roll is +1 for each Lead your opponent has in play.

in_play.name: Ready to Rumble
in_play.raw_text: Your next turn roll is +1 for each Lead your opponent has in play.

actions.raw_text: The player with the lowest turn roll wins the turn roll.

competitor.gimmick_text: The player with the lowest turn roll wins the turn roll.
